parsed.production_notes: The top half features a human actor recorded on video. The bottom half features a 3D animated AI avatar with stylized, non-photorealistic features and slightly unnatural lip-syncing.

characters.appearance: Young adult female, slim build, fair complexion, blonde hair with dark roots.
characters.wardrobe: Yellow hoodie and white wireless earbuds.

characters.appearance: 3D animated female avatar, fair complexion, wavy orange hair, large green eyes.
characters.wardrobe: Yellow sweater and gold hoop earrings.

scenes.setting: Bedroom, cozy lighting, purple blanket, string lights.

panels.panel_visual_description: Character A is lying on a bed, resting her head on her hand. She wears a yellow hoodie and a white earbud. The background features a purple textured blanket and warm string lights. The lighting is soft and cozy.
Character B, a 3D animated woman, is lying on a white pillow, resting her head on her hand. She wears a yellow sweater and gold hoop earrings. The lighting is soft, and the background is blurred.

scenes.visual_description: A split-screen layout with a human woman on top and an animated avatar on the bottom. Both are lying down in similar poses, wearing yellow tops, simulating a video call. Text subtitles appear dynamically in the center of the screen as they speak.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character B says: 英語話せる？ [Can you speak English?]
Character A says: Yes, I know English.
Character B says: ネイティブはこう言うよ: "I speak English" [Natives say it like this: "I speak English"]
Character A says: I speak English.
Character B says: 何歳？ [How old are you?]
Character A says: My age is 23.
Character B says: うーん..."I'm 23"って言うんだよ。 [Hmm... you say "I'm 23".]
Character A says: I'm 23!
Character B says: 名前は？ [What is your name?]
Character A says: My name is Nesly.
Character B says: ネイティブは普通こう言うよ: I'm Nesly. [Natives usually say it like this: I'm Nesly.]
Character A says: I'm Nesly.
Character B says: よくできたね！ [Well done!]
Character A says: Thank you, but who are you?
Character B says: 私はプラクティカのAIチューターだよ！毎日こうやって英語の練習ができるよ！ [I am Praktika's AI tutor! You can practice English like this every day!]
Character A says: Ah, but.. my English is A1. I cannot speak.
Character B says: 大丈夫、母国語で教えてあげられるよ。 [It's okay, I can teach you in your native language.]
Character A says: You know my language?
Character B says: もちろん、AIだからね。 [Of course, because I'm an AI.]
Character A says: Okay, I'll download this app.

panels.panel_visual_description: A solid white background with no characters or props.

scenes.visual_description: A solid white screen displaying a purple app logo in the center. Below the logo is the brand name and two app store download badges.

praktika.ai
